interviewNotes.section1: Age 18, UMBC first year. Background: content creation > trading > reselling (replicas, stopped when pandabuy shut down) > AI automation (1 year, never monetized) > AI voice agents (1-2 months, dental/medspa focus, didn't sell) > websites with AI (current). Built custom OS CRM with Twilio dialer. Cold called ~20-30 times over 3-4 months. Closed 1 client: painting business, $600, home services. Summer 2026 locked in, 3.5 months available.
interviewNotes.section2: Home services (uncle owns construction/roofing/contracting + 1 live client). Medical/clinics (studied ~1 month for voice agents). Gym/fitness (personal). Law (interested but holding off).
interviewNotes.section3: Computer/digital fluency (family go-to). Conviction that AI monetization works. Understands why websites matter for SEO and trust. Painting client: 365 views in 10 active days, top Google and Maps ranking, 1-2 contact form leads.
interviewNotes.section4: No warm network of business owners. Peer network in TRW and Discord (other AI web agency owners). Facebook groups identified but not yet joined.
interviewNotes.section5: One $600 payment. Sees gap clearly: bad Maps listings, no websites, no reviews, no contact forms, no trust badges.
interviewNotes.section6: Prefers home services (friendly, fast close, one-shot builds). Open to medical/chiro for higher ticket. Avoids low AOV niches (restaurants, gyms). Qualifier: 6+ reviews in past 6 months.
interviewNotes.section7: 50-60 hrs/week. $100-200 capital, part-time job planned. Design 4/5, sales 2/5, SEO 3/5, content 3/5. 12-month target: $50-100k/month profit.
